General common rules: Convert numeric values to their string equivalents (e.g., "3", "250", "1000", "0").
Add the SkiaSharp NuGet package reference to the project (e.g., dotnet add package SkiaSharp).
Dispose all disposable objects (SKBitmap, SKCanvas, SKImage, SKData) using 'using' statements.
Set colour, error correction, scaling, height and rotation properties as strings matching the API expectations (hex colour strings, numeric strings).
